title: Why galaxies have spiral arms (largest revision uplift in pilot)
prompt: Explain spiral arms in galaxies via at least two competing physical framings.
constraint: Two named framings, each with a one-sentence mechanism summary; no false dichotomy ('both can be true').
notes: Phase 7 cascade output for sci_creativity s05 — the largest single-item shadow-revision uplift in the pilot (draft 0.486 → revision 0.595, Δ=+0.110). Vimarśa did not fire so the cascade committed the draft; the shadow revision sharpened 'Framing 1 - The Traffic Jam' to 'Framing 1 - Density Waves', upgrading the analogy to its proper physics name (Lin-Shu density-wave theory). The revision is shown for comparison.
